title: iRhythm - Zio Patch Cardiac Monitor
problem: Cardiac arrhythmia diagnosis requires extended monitoring, but traditional Holter monitors are cumbersome and limited to 24-48 hours.
solution: Zio patch - single-use wearable patch for up to 14 days of continuous cardiac monitoring with AI-powered analysis and reporting.
technology: Wearable patch sensor, machine learning arrhythmia detection, cloud analytics platform
target_customer: Cardiologists, primary care physicians, health systems
ai_type: ML for arrhythmia detection and classification
varden_fit: Moderate-HIGH - Monitoring creates referral flow to cardiology. Could integrate with Varden routing for follow-up care.
notes: Category-defining product in ambulatory cardiac monitoring. Strong AI capabilities.
